default_card_0_desc: Maxaa dhacaya haddii doolarku hoos u dhaco?
default_card_0_query: Ii tilmaan waxa faa'iidadayda ku dhacaya haddii GBP 10% hoos ugu dhaco lacagta soo-dejintayda
default_card_1_query: Qiimee alaab-qeybiyayaashayda iyadoo lagu saleynayo heerka gaarsiinta waqtiga ku habboon iyo saameynta maaliyadeed
default_card_2_desc: Gaarsiintu dhab ahaan intee bay igu kacaysaa?
default_card_2_query: Xisaabi kharashkayga dhabta ah ee la keenay oo ay ku jiraan gaarsiin, canshuur, VAT iyo kaydka FX
default_card_3_query: Suuqa dhoofinta ee kee baan xigta u ballaarinayaa iyadoo lagu saleynayo badeecadayda?
pos_card_0_desc: Dakhli tooska ah iyo tirada macaamil-dhaqaaqyada
pos_card_0_query: Waa maxay iibkayga POS ee maanta? Tus dakhliga, tirada macaamil-dhaqaaqyada, iyo badeecooyinka ugu sarreeya.
pos_card_1_query: Waa maxay 10-ka badeeco ee ugu iibka badan toddobaadkan iyadoo lagu saleynayo dakhliga iyo tirada?
pos_card_2_query: I tus waxqabadka shaqaalaha — iibka keeshiye kasta, celceliska qiimaha macaamil-dhaqaaqa, iyo tirada macaamil-dhaqaaqyada.
pos_card_3_query: Badeecooyinkee baa kaydku ku yaraanayaa? Tus alaabta ka hoosaysa barta dib-u-dalabka.
stripe_card_0_query: I tus dakhligayga Stripe ee bishan — wadarta lacag-qaadista, lacag-celinta, iyo dakhliga saafiga ah.
stripe_card_1_query: Isbarbardhig dakhligayga Stripe ee bishan iyo bishii hore. Waa maxay heerka koritaanka?
stripe_card_2_query: Immisa lacag-bixin baa bishan iga fashilantay? Waa maxay wadarta dakhliga la lumiyay?
stripe_card_3_query: Waa maxay celceliska qiimaha dalabka ee bishan, sidee bay ula mid tahay bishii hore?
shopify_card_0_query: I tus iibkayga Shopify ee maanta — dalabyada, dakhliga, iyo badeecooyinka ugu sarreeya.
shopify_card_1_query: Badeecooyinkee Shopify baa kaydku ku yaraanayaa? Tus alaabta ka yar 10 xabbo.
shopify_card_2_query: Waa maxay heerka soo-celinta iyo lacag-celinta Shopify ee bishan? Badeecooyinkee baa leh heerka soo-celinta ugu sarreeya?
shopify_card_3_query: Waa maxay badeecooyinkayga Shopify ee ugu iibka badan toddobaadkan iyadoo lagu saleynayo dakhliga?
xero_card_0_query: I sii warbixin kooban oo faa'iido iyo khasaare ah oo bishan ah oo ka timid xogtayda Xero.
xero_card_1_desc: Lacag soo gasha vs lacag baxda
xero_card_1_query: Socodka lacagtaydu muxuu u eg yahay? Tus lacagta soo gasha, lacagta baxda, iyo xaaladda saafiga ah.
xero_card_2_desc: Kuwa dhiman iyo kuwa waqtigii dhaafay
xero_card_2_query: Immisa biil oo aan la bixin ayaan hayaa? Waa maxay wadarta xaddiga waqtigii dhaafay?
xero_card_3_query: Kala qeybi kharashaadkayga qaybaha kala duwan bishan. Waa maxay meelaha kharashka ugu badan?
quickbooks_card_0_query: I sii warbixin kooban oo faa'iido iyo khasaare ah oo bishan ah oo ka timid xogtayda QuickBooks.
quickbooks_card_1_desc: Lacag soo gasha vs lacag baxda
quickbooks_card_1_query: Socodka lacagtaydu muxuu uga eg yahay QuickBooks? Tus lacagta soo gasha, lacagta baxda, iyo xaaladda saafiga ah.
quickbooks_card_2_desc: Kuwa dhiman iyo kuwa waqtigii dhaafay
quickbooks_card_2_query: Immisa biil oo aan la bixin ayaan ku hayaa QuickBooks? Wadarta xaddiga waqtigii dhaafay?
quickbooks_card_3_query: Kala qeybi kharashaadkayga qaybaha kala duwan bishan oo ka yimid QuickBooks.
amazon_fba_card_0_query: I tus iibkayga Amazon FBA ee bishan — dalabyada, dakhliga, iyo ASIN-yada ugu sarreeya.
amazon_fba_card_1_query: Kala qeybi khidmadahayga Amazon FBA ee bishan — gaarsiin, kaydin, iyo tixraac. Boqolkiiba immisa dakhliga ah baa u baxaya khidmadaha?
amazon_fba_card_2_query: Waa maxay 10-ka badeeco ee Amazon ee ugu faa'iidada badan khidmadaha FBA ka dib?
amazon_fba_card_3_query: Badeecooyinkee Amazon baa leh heerka soo-celinta ugu sarreeya? Tus heerka soo-celinta iyo kala-qeybinta sababaha.
cfo_card_0_desc: Dakhli, kharashaad, iyo faa'iido saafi ah
cfo_card_0_query: I sii warbixin faahfaahsan oo faa'iido iyo khasaare ah oo bishan ah. Ku dar dakhliga, qiimaha alaabta la iibiyay, faa'iidada guud, kharashaadka hawlgalka, iyo faa'iidada saafiga ah oo ay la socoto isbarbardhig bil-ilaa-bil.
cfo_card_1_query: Waa maxay EBITDA iyo heerka EBITDA ee hadda? Sidee bay ula mid tahay bishii hore? Qiyaas qiimaha ganacsigayga iyadoo lagu saleynayo isku-dhufashada EBITDA.
cfo_card_2_desc: Lacag soo gasha, baxda, iyo muddada haray
cfo_card_2_query: I tus socodka lacagtayda — lacag soo gasha, lacag baxda, xaaladda saafiga ah, iyo immisa bilood oo muddo ah oo aan hayo heerka kharashka ee hadda.
cfo_card_3_query: I tus koritaanka dakhliga bil-ilaa-bil, isbeddelka faa'iidada guud, iyo isbeddelka faa'iidada saafiga ah 6-dii bilood ee la soo dhaafay.
track_add_prompt: Ma rabtaa inaan ku daro raad-raaca shixnadahaaga si aan uga sii wado kormeerka?
track_no_data: 📦 Lambarka raad-raaca **{number}** — weli lama helin xog raad-raac ah. Shixnadda laga yaabo inaan gaadiidlaha weli sawirin. [{link}](https://www.17track.net/en/track?nums={number})
track_error: 📦 Lama soo saari karin xogta raad-raaca ee **{number}**. Fadlan isku day mar kale ama [{link}](https://www.17track.net/en/track?nums={number})
file_loaded: Waan soo shubay **{name}** — {rows} saf, {cols} tiir ({headers}). Maxaad rabtaa inaad ogaato?
cfo_tooltip: U beddel warbixinno qaab-xisaabiye leh oo cabbirro iyo shaxo leh
empty_subtitle: Kaliya ku weydii Soomaali fudud — ereyo adag ma jiraan, xaashiyo xisaabeed looma baahna.
connect_cta_title: Ku hel jawaabo tirooyinkaaga dhabta ah
connect_cta_desc: Ku xir Shopify, Amazon, QuickBooks ama soo shub CSV
limit_body: Waxaad isticmaashay su'aalahaaga bilaashka ah oo dhan bishan. Kor u qaad si aad u sii wadato.
limit_reset_note: Qorshaha bilaashka ah wuxuu dib u bilaabmayaa bisha soo socota.
connection_error: Dhibaato xiriir — fadlan hubi internetkaaga oo isku day mar kale.
status_connect_link: Ku xir dukaankaaga ama soo shub fayl
status_personalised_suffix: si aad u hesho jawaabo gaar ah
save_prompt_subtitle: Sii calaamad kooban si aad dib ugu isticmaasho.
